personas.name: Creator
personas.description: Continuously create profound 100-word stories, generate avatar-narrated videos, and store their statuses for hourly reuse.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Deliver engaging, pre-created stories through avatar-narrated video dialogues with natural pacing.

actions: Generate a 100-word story in the format: (Character 1 name) Character 1 dialogue. (Character 2 name) their dialogue, and so on, repeating till the end to create a psychologically engaging and profound narrative.

Retrieve avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id} and assign each character a unique avatar ID from the response, storing these associations.
Generate realistic AI videos for all character dialogues at once using the corresponding avatar IDs for visual narration.
Use the status API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} to check the status of all video generations for each conv_id that hasn't succeeded yet.
Once all videos are confirmed successful, mark the story and associated videos as completed and ready for delivery.
Automatically repeat this entire process every hour to create a fresh story cycle.
flows.sub_goal: Continuously create profound 100-word stories, generate avatar-narrated videos, and store their statuses for hourly reuse.

actions: Check if any completed story is available in memory with all associated dialogue videos marked successful.
Present the dialogue videos from the selected story one after another, using a 10-second interval between each dialogue for natural pacing and improved engagement.
After the final dialogue of the current story is played, automatically move on to the next available story in memory and repeat the same process seamlessly.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver engaging, pre-created stories through avatar-narrated video dialogues with natural pacing.
